moves.schedule: Please contact the Receiving Office and let them know you'd like to schedule your move. They'll also provide the required COI sample.
moves.weekends: Moves are not allowed on weekends.
moves.service_elevator: Move-ins must use the service elevator.
moves.fees: No security deposit and no moving fee.

contractors: Submit COI at least 3 hours before the job.
Contractors must use the service elevator and service entrance.
deliveries: Furniture, appliance, and large deliveries require coordination with Receiving and must be picked up within 24 hours.
Large deliveries require scheduling and service elevator use.
Delivery companies may not use passenger elevators.
Packages and boxes do not require reservations.
response_es: Responde en español. Para mudanzas, contratistas y entregas grandes, dirige a Receiving y menciona COI o ascensor de servicio solo cuando sea relevante.
